brief: Call captures onboarding friction during a renewal review with a enterprise customer. The useful demo behavior is seeing that one call becomes part of a broader voice pattern instead of staying isolated.
whyItMatters: Customer voice only shines when users can connect many calls into patterns, not just open one summary card.

searchIntro: Search across many reference customer calls to spot recurring friction, product pull, and renewal risk patterns.
